name: Peanut Butter Sundae Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 quart saucepan, heat brown sugar, half and half, and honey over medium heat.
2. Stir constantly until the mixture reaches boiling point.
3. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter until smooth.
4. Serve warm over yogurt, ice cream, waffles, or pancakes.
